case_title: NADINE SBERLO ET AL VS. SEAN SHEPPARD ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SBERLO, NADINE SBERLO, YOEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEPPARD, SEAN SHEPPARD, TANIA $2,738.85 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,888.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($50.00 FEE) SERVED FEB-27-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHEPPARD, TANIA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,738.85 FILED BY SBERLO, NADINE SBERLO, YOEL AS TO DEFENDANT SHEPPARD, SEAN SHEPPARD, TANIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-18-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($50.00 FEE) SERVED FEB-27-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHEPPARD, SEAN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT SHEPPARD, SEAN SHEPPARD, TANIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS NADINE SBERLO AND YOEL SBERLO ARE PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS SEAN SHEPPARD AND TANIS SHEPPARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.
